---
title: "Clinical Trial Design and Analysis"
subtitle: "BIO-005 | Track A — Biostatistics"
description: "The statistical science of designing and analyzing experiments on human subjects. Covers classical, adaptive, and Bayesian trial designs with regulatory context."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Clinical Trial Design and Analysis

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
